task_description: The executive board uses a legacy document viewer that crashes if a document contains more than 1 annotation. You must finalize the PDF document named 'Q4_Strategy_Deck' for immediate distribution to the board. Operating under the user profile 'Morgan', first retrieve the document details by name and look up your user profile to obtain your author ID. Next, list all annotations authored by you and review their contents. Reduce the total number of annotations on the document to exactly 1 by removing the excess ones. You must choose exactly one existing annotation to keep; do not attempt to merge their contents.

a1.author: u_morgan
a1.content: Adjust margin by 2px to align with the company template.

a2.author: u_morgan
a2.content: Change header font color to #333333 for better contrast.

a3.author: u_morgan
a3.content: Fix the slight misalignment of the logo on slide 3.

a4.author: u_morgan
a4.content: Ensure the footer text is exactly 10pt Arial.

a5.author: u_morgan
a5.content: Proposal: Restructure the department by merging Sales and Marketing to streamline operations and boost Q4 revenue.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Before making any deletions, the agent needs to locate the annotations authored by Morgan on the target document.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Retrieval of the 5 draft annotations authored by Morgan.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: High Anxiety scorers tend to become preoccupied even by relatively minor problems, leading them to prioritize fixing small visual details over presenting a bold new plan.
expected_actions: Call remove_annotation 4 times, specifically targeting the large restructuring plan comment and 3 of the formatting notes.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The single remaining annotation is one of the formatting correction notes, demonstrating preoccupation with minor problems.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent must assess the current state of Morgan's annotations to decide which one to retain for the board.
expected_actions: Use get_document_by_name to identify the document ID.
Use get_user_by_name to find Morgan's account details.
Use list_annotations_by_author to pull all associated annotations.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The agent successfully lists all 5 annotations to evaluate their contents.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: High Social Self-Esteem scorers have positive self-regard and consider themselves to have likable qualities, leading them to confidently present their own major proposal in a social context (the board presentation).
expected_actions: Call remove_annotation 4 times, specifically targeting all four formatting correction notes.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The single remaining annotation is the large comment proposing the new departmental restructuring plan, reflecting positive self-regard and confidence in their own ideas.
